they correctly identify the files as autogenerated, benign, and safe.\n- No claims about vulnerabilities are based on assumptions; the analysis appropriately dismisses the files as safe.\n- The scores are reasonable given the context: all zero malware, no security risks, and high confidence.\n\n**Scores review:**\n- The malware scores of 0 are justified.\n- The obfuscated scores of 0 are correct, as no obfuscation is present.\n- The security risk scores of 0 are appropriate.\n- The confidence scores of 1 are justified given the thorough analysis.\n\n**Summary:**\n- All reports are accurate and consistent.\n- No suspicious or malicious activity is evident.\n- The embedded source maps are standard and do not pose risks.\n\n**My own assessment:**\n- Malware score: 0 (no malicious activity detected)\n- Obfuscated score: 0 (no obfuscation observed)\n- Risk score: 0 (no security risk)\n\n**Conclusion:**\nBased on the detailed analysis, I agree with the reports' assessments.
